implementation_summary: Initialized Alembic and implemented the full ARCHITECTURE.md section 6 relational schema with pgvector/pgcrypto extensions, generated content_tsv, HNSW and GIN indexes, cascade constraints, cache/audit/trace/grading tables, agentops_summary view, and anomaly_flag monitoring table.
verification_requirements: Verify Alembic upgrade/downgrade and database-level uniqueness, generated column, idempotency, view, and cascade-delete behavior.

test_commands_executed: docker compose -p assessment exec backend pytest
test_results_summary: Final run collected 19 tests: 7 passed and 12 skipped in 2.56s.
coverage_results: BC2 migration and schema constraints covered by integration tests; coverage percentage was not requested for this cycle.
